creator: nxjoseph@protonmail.com
text:
Created attachment 254590
www/py-spotdl.patch

spotdl is a command-line tool to find and download songs
from Spotify playlists via YouTube, including album art, lyrics, and
metadata. It is designed for ease of use and speed, making it
the fastest and most accurate music downloader available.

WWW:    https://github.com/spotDL/spotify-downloader

Thanks in advance.
